summary: All 10 features tested successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - login, Yordan chat opens, translation language selector in header with 'Превод на съобщения' dialog, UI language selector in Settings with 'Език на интерфейса' section, both selectors operate independently.

issues: React warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage) - cosmetic console warning only

login_with_credentials.details: Login with konstantin_sabev@abv.bg / Banane.com works and redirects to /chat

yordan_conversation_opens.details: Clicking Yordan in sidebar opens the chat with emoji messages displayed

chat_header_language_selector_button.details: Language selector button shows flag and language name (e.g., '🇧🇬 Български', '🇩🇪 Deutsch')

translation_dialog_title.details: Dialog opens with title 'Превод на съобщения' (Message Translation)

translation_dialog_language_options.details: Dialog shows 17 language options including Auto (🌐), English (🇬🇧), Bulgarian (🇧🇬), German (🇩🇪), etc.

language_selection_updates_button.details: Selecting German closes dialog and updates button to '🇩🇪 Deutsch'

click_emoji_message_reveals_translation.details: Clicking emoji message shows translation with Languages icon and 'tap for emoji' hint

settings_dialog_ui_language_section.details: Settings dialog has 'Език на интерфейса' (UI Language) section

settings_inline_language_selector.details: Settings shows inline language selector with 17 language buttons

language_selectors_independent_operation.details: Chat header (translation) and Settings (UI) language selectors work independently - header shows German while Settings shows Bulgarian

critical_code_review_comments: ChatLayout.jsx line 75: translationLang stored in localStorage('mojichat_translation_lang'), separate from userLanguage
ChatLayout.jsx line 343-346: updateTranslationLang() stores to localStorage and shows toast 'Превод на: {language}'
ChatLayout.jsx line 332-339: updateLanguage() calls PUT /api/users/language to persist UI language to server
ChatLayout.jsx line 1041-1045: LanguageSelector in header uses label='Превод' which triggers 'Превод на съобщения' title
ChatLayout.jsx line 626-630: Settings uses LanguageSelector with variant='inline' for inline display
LanguageSelector.jsx line 88: label='Превод' changes dialog title to 'Превод на съобщения'
EmojiRevealCard.jsx line 62-67: Translates using localStorage translationLang, re-translates if language changed
seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation with Yordan containing emoji messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All language selector features verified working: 1) Translation language selector in chat header with 'Превод на съобщения' dialog stores selection in localStorage('mojichat_translation_lang'), 2) UI language selector in Settings dialog with 'Език на интерфейса' section stores via PUT /api/users/language, 3) Both selectors operate independently - changing one doesn't affect the other. Translation defaults to Bulgarian (bg). React warning about setState during render is cosmetic only.
tests_passed: Backend: Login returns token and user info
Backend: POST /api/translate with target_language='bg' returns Bulgarian text
Backend: POST /api/translate with target_language='de' returns German text
Backend: POST /api/translate with target_language='en' returns English text
Backend: Translation requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/languages returns supported languages
Backend: PUT /api/users/language updates to German
Backend: PUT /api/users/language updates to Bulgarian
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns preferred_language
Backend: Invalid language code rejected with 400
Backend: GET /api/conversations returns user's conversations
Backend: GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns messages
Frontend: Login with email/password works
Frontend: Yordan conversation opens when clicked
Frontend: Chat header shows language selector button with flag + name
Frontend: Translation dialog has title 'Превод на съобщения'
Frontend: Translation dialog shows 17 language options
Frontend: Language selection updates header button
Frontend: Click emoji message reveals translation
Frontend: Settings has 'Език на интерфейса' section
Frontend: Settings has inline language selector
Frontend: Both language selectors operate independently
